## Skill Name

e.g., `extract-keywords`

## Execution Type

- [ ] `prompt`
- [ ] `tool_call`
- [ ] `code`
- [ ] `chain`

## Description

What does this skill do? Why is it useful?

## Inputs / Outputs

**Inputs:**
- `text` (string) — ...

**Outputs:**
- `result` (string) — ...

## Would you like to build this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this skill
- [ ] No, just suggesting the idea
